ops.text: PRE-REGISTRATION E33 (Wave 0; merged portfolio ranks 4+5). Hypothesis: a compiled artifact — an auto-induced rubric (Auto-Rubric-style, from contrastive pairs) or a distilled steering persona (VirtualME-style) — added to / replacing sections of triage prompt v6 raises agreement with the blind opus auditor. Data: auditor-gold v1 (manifest 13ddfa2e…): TRAIN(200) for induction material, DEV(100) for all selection, TEST(241) scored EXACTLY ONCE at close. Targeting inputs from E30.3 (binding): induction pairs oversample the judge-over-flagging asymmetry (93v12) and the operational_directive boundary (top flips: direction/wrong_approach/new_task→od). Arms: (a) rubric — ≤4 candidates induced from ~70 train pairs (disagreements + matched agreements); (b) persona — ≤4 candidates distilled from train steering history. Selection funnel (dev only): all candidates + v6 baseline screened on a FIXED dev-50 subset; top-2 overall + baseline on full dev-100; dev winner advances iff it beats baseline on dev-100 binary agreement. Test (once): winner + v6 baseline on all 241. DECISION RULE: exact McNemar p<0.05 (binary is_steering agreement w/ auditor, discordant pairs winner-vs-v6) AND ≥3 points absolute agreement gain; else null. Any LLM-as-judge step (none planned in scoring — scoring is mechanical label agreement; applies to induction-quality checks if used) runs PoLL 3-jury per E30.3's ladder. Generation caps: ≤8 candidates total, ≤2 induction passes per arm. Scoring model: sonnet (pipeline judge tier), induction: opus tier. Spend: $30 HARD CAP, driver keeps a running token ledger and aborts at $27 projected. Mirror corpus only; harness ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E33/ with own venv installing cc-steer from git+file://…@main (immune to working-copy churn). VERIFY lane (independent): recompute McNemar + agreement from persisted per-row JSONL, audit test-touched-once (no test id appears in any pre-final artifact), split integrity vs manifest, candidate/generation caps, ledger ≤ cap. Deliverable is a recipe delta recommendation — no artifact ships from the experiment.
